headline: Federal Realty Stock Rises 12.3% in 3 Months: Will it Keep Going?
summary: FRT shares are up 12.3% in 3 months as FFO and leasing hit records. Can momentum last as rate risks linger?

headline: How The Federal Realty (FRT) Investment Story Is Evolving Without New Analyst Commentary
summary: The latest update for Federal Realty Investment Trust comes with no change in the current price target, keeping expectations steady for now. Even without a shift in price target, the absence of fresh analyst commentary itself can be informative for how sentiment is holding. As you read on, you will see how to keep track of these updates and what to watch as the narrative around this REIT continues to evolve. Wall Street's queuing for one rocket. While SpaceX counts down to its IPO, other...
